audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and a sad tone, speaking at a moderate pace.
temporal_description: A bald man in a dark suit is holding a handgun, aiming it forward in a dimly lit store aisle. Later, a man in a green jacket lies on the floor, clutching his side, with a visible wound. Another man is buried in dirt, partially covered, with his face and upper body visible. A person is seen wrapped in plastic, lying on a blue surface, with a gold watch on their wrist. Finally, a man is crawling on the floor while engulfed in flames, moving forward on his hands and knees.
